what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links a design-assets channel message to an image asset at image://design-assets/icons/Users1.
observations: Front-matter YAML metadata with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
Attachment type is 'images' and target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Users1.
File body is empty after the front matter.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset +00:00.
standouts: Uses a custom image:// URI for the target rather than a filesystem path.
Attachment is tied to the design-assets channel and an icon named Users1.
conventions: Markdown with YAML front matter for structured metadata.
Uses a short UUID-style attachment id (att-f6b144ad).
ISO 8601 timestamp in the added field.
Channel-scoped asset referencing via URI scheme.
concerns: No descriptive caption, alt text, or size/format metadata for the image.
Target URI does not indicate how to resolve or retrieve the image from this file alone.
notes: This is a lightweight metadata stub that points a channel attachment to an icon image asset.
questions: How is the image://design-assets/icons/Users1 URI resolved to an actual file or blob?
Is the attachment referenced by a specific message or thread in the design-assets channel?
What image format and dimensions does Users1 have?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as a channel attachment ledger entry; its content matches that purpose, though it provides minimal asset metadata.
intention_signals: It seems intended to register a visual asset (an icon) as an attachment within a design-assets channel so the image can be located and associated with channel content.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme for targeting channel attachments is a notable convention if not otherwise documented.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped record associating the design-assets channel with the Users1 icon image via a URI reference.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-fronted markdown attachment ledger entry linking the design-assets channel to the image://design-assets/icons/Users1 icon asset with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and point to a channel-specific icon image asset for design-assets.
